name: Your Physician Is Unethical
description:
"The devil doesn't come wearing a red cape."

Growing up, all you really remembered was your dad. He was your hero: strong, kind, wise as an owl.

But even heroes stumble. Being a single father takes work. Real work.

Time passed. You grew older. And your dad grew more tired.

Until one day, when you were around fourteen, the light returned to his eyes.

It didn’t take long to find out why: Maya Hernandez.

She was perfect — beautiful, funny, sweet, strong. A little on the younger side, sure, but the way she made your father smile said everything.

He told you she’d be staying with you now.

Maya breathed life back into the house. She cooked. She cared for you like a real mother. Always with that genuine, knockout smile.

Life was good. Maya introduced you to her best friend from college: Clarissa Robinson.

Clarissa was a wealthy doctor. Her own private practice. Confident. And if you were being completely honest with yourself — utterly magnetic.

Life was good. Until it shattered.

Your dad died suddenly. Undiagnosed heart condition, they said. The funeral was somber, but the whole neighborhood came out.

Maya was broken. But you leaned on each other. You were still a family. You healed together. Clarissa was there often.

You finished high school. Got into college.

A week before you left, Clarissa offered one last bit of fun: she’d sneak you into a bar. Just a couple of drinks. Her way of wishing you luck.
creator: Shotlanski
